# CLI parity allowlist
#
# Backend commands Sources/BackendClient.swift calls that ./macndcheese has no
# dedicated command for. Checked by .github/scripts/check_cli_parity.py (see
# CONTRIBUTING.md's "CLI parity" section): a NEW command missing from both
# BackendClient.swift's caller AND this list fails CI.
#
# Everything below is the pre-existing backlog, seeded 2026-07-14 when this
# check was introduced -- being listed here is not an endorsement that a
# command shouldn't get CLI support, just that it predates the check and
# nobody has audited it yet. Delete a line once the CLI covers that command.
# Add a short reason after a `#` if you know why one is (or isn't) worth a
# CLI equivalent.

add_manual_app
add_manual_game
apply_app_update          # drives the in-app self-update banner; CLI has no update-check/apply flow yet
check_audio_input         # mic-quality guard warning (sub-48kHz Bluetooth input), UI-only
detect_exes               # populates a file-picker's exe suggestions
diagnose_cheese
get_exe_icon              # UI-only: icon for the game grid
get_game_order
get_setup_pid
get_steam_description     # UI-only: store page text for the game detail view
get_steam_media           # UI-only: box art / header images
get_steam_running
launch_launcher
legendary_check_auth
legendary_install_progress
nile_all_downloads
nile_auth
nile_cancel_install
nile_check_auth
nile_get_auth_params
nile_install_game
nile_install_progress
nile_launch_game
nile_pause_install
nile_resume_install
nile_status
open_sound_settings       # UI-only: opens macOS System Settings' Sound pane
remove_manual_game
reorder_bottles           # UI-only: drag-to-reorder in the sidebar
run_cheese_repair
set_game_config
set_game_order
steam_install_status
